profile.title: Profile
profile.delete_account_message: Are you sure you want to delete your account? Your account will be deleted after 7 days. During this time, you can log in again to recover your account.
profile.sign_out_anonymous_message: This temporary session isn't linked to any account. If you sign out now, ALL current data will be lost permanently. Do you still want to continue?

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use the application. Please read this policy carefully.
privacy_policy.data_collection_body: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when registering or using certain features. This may include name, email, usage data and device information.
privacy_policy.data_usage_body: Collected data is used to operate core features, improve user experience, personalize content, provide support, enhance security and comply with legal obligations.
privacy_policy.data_sharing_body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share limited data with service providers strictly for app functionality (e.g. analytics, crash reporting) under confidentiality obligations.
privacy_policy.security_body: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect data; however, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure. Users are encouraged to use strong credentials and keep them confidential.
privacy_policy.user_rights_body: Depending on jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete or restrict certain processing of your personal data. Contact support for requests.
privacy_policy.changes_body: We may update this policy periodically. Material changes will be communicated through in-app notifications or version notes. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
privacy_policy.contact_body: If you have questions or concerns about this policy, please contact us via the support section inside the application.

term_of_service.title: Terms of Service
term_of_service.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the application. By accessing or using the app you agree to be bound by these terms.
term_of_service.license_body: We grant you a limited, non-transferable, revocable license to use the application for personal, non-commercial purposes.
term_of_service.user_accounts_body: You are responsible for credentials confidentiality and all activities under your account.
term_of_service.acceptable_use_body: Do not misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, reverse engineer or disrupt functionality.
term_of_service.content_body: You retain rights to submitted content; we have a limited license to process it to provide functionality.
term_of_service.termination_body: We may suspend/terminate for violations or security risks. Some obligations survive termination.
term_of_service.disclaimer_body: Service provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind.
term_of_service.limitation_body: Liability limited to amount paid in prior 12 months where permitted by law.
term_of_service.changes_body: We may update periodically; continued use constitutes acceptance.
term_of_service.contact_body: Questions? Contact support through the application.

about.title: About
about.executive_summary_body: A modern mobile application built with React Native and Supabase.
